description: Apple MLX engine, based on the MLX Python implementation

releaseNotes.releaseNotes:
- OpenAI gpt-oss support! (20B, 120B)
  - Requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.21-b4
  - Improves performance

  - mlx-engine==93027e2
  - mlx==0.27.1
  - mlx-lm==0.26.3
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.2

- OpenAI gpt-oss support! (20B, 120B)
  - Requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.21-b4

  - mlx==0.27.1
  - mlx-lm==0.26.2
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.2

- GLM 4.5 support
- Update MLX packages

  - mlx-engine==c1202c0
  - mlx==0.27.1
  - mlx-lm==0.26.1
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.1

- Ernie 4.5 support

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==c1202c0
  - mlx==0.26.3
  - mlx-lm==0.26.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.1

- Ernie 4.5 support
- Fixed a bug where generation couldn't be stopped during prompt processing

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==c1202c0
  - mlx==0.26.3
  - mlx-lm==0.26.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.1

- Support for LFM2
- Gemma 3n fixes
  - Added support for re-uploaded model weights
  - Improved image understanding by fixing bugs in the vision encoder
- Mistral 3.2 performance improvements through unified mlx-engine architecture

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==89f9a9a
  - mlx==0.26.3
  - mlx-lm==0.26.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.1

- Gemma 3n
  - Add support for re-uploaded model weights
  - Improved image understanding by fixing bugs in the vision encoder
  - Improved generation speed (tok/sec, ttft) through unified mlx-engine architecture
- Support for BitNet b1.58, Falcon-E models

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==848733af
  - mlx==0.26.3
  - mlx-lm==0.26.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.3.1

- Gemma 3n
  - Improved image understanding by fixing bugs in the vision encoder
  - Improved generation speed (tok/sec, ttft) through unified mlx-engine architecture
  - Improved OCR performance
  - Support for quantizations
- Support for BitNet b1.58 and Falcon-E models
- Patch layer norm race condition

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==ecc2cf4
  - mlx==0.26.1
  - mlx-lm==0.25.2
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.26

- Gemma 3:
 - Improved LLM output quality in chats with multiple images
 - Fixed gemma-3-text model bug: "missing vision_config"
- Pixtral/Gemma 3: Text prompt caching and TTFT improvements
- Allow empty prompts (fix "Prompt tokens must be non-empty")
- Xiaomi MiMo model support

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==ecc2cf4
  - mlx==0.25.2
  - mlx-lm==0.24.1
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.26

- Gemma 3 improvements:
 - Unified mlx-engine architecture improves TTFT, enables text-only prompt caching
 - Improved generation quality with multiple images
- Xiaomi MiMo model support

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==f98317e
  - mlx==0.25.2
  - mlx-lm==0.24.1
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.26

- Add support for Qwen3 and Qwen3-MoE model families
- Fixed KV cache quantization for gemma-3 text-only models
- Upgraded python code packaging to use venvstacks version `0.4.1` 

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==52f20de
  - mlx==0.25.1
  - mlx-lm==0.24.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.25

- Fixed KV cache quantization for gemma-3 text-only models

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==52f20de
  - mlx==0.25.1
  - mlx-lm==0.24.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.25

- Add support for GLM model family
- Improved prompt caching, fix Gemma 3 prompt caching bug

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==52f20de
  - mlx==0.25.0
  - mlx-lm==0.23.2
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.25

- Gemma 3 QAT support
  - Fixed bug where Gemma 3 models repeatedly output `<pad>`
- Llama 4 vision support
  - Recommended minimum specs: 96 GB memory and macOS 15 (Sequoia)
- Improved prompt processing speed for MOE models
- Fixed bug where Qwen VLMs failed to load

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==163ce19
  - mlx==0.25.0
  - mlx-lm==0.22.5
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.23

- Gemma 3 QAT support
  - Fixed bug where Gemma 3 models repeatedly output `<pad>`
- Llama 4 vision support
  - Recommended minimum specs: 96 GB memory and macOS 15 (Sequoia)

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==69abd0f
  - mlx==0.24.2
  - mlx-lm==0.22.5
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.23

- Added support for Llama 4 (text only).
  - Recommended minimum specs: 96 GB memory and macOS 15 (Sequoia)
  - Please use these models from the lmstudio-community organization:
    - Llama 4 Scout 4-bit: lmstudio-community/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-MLX-text-4bit
    - Llama 4 Scout 8-bit: lmstudio-community/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-MLX-text-8bit
  - Llama-4-Scout-6bit and Llama-4-Maverick-4bit quantizations coming soon!

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==200df55
  - mlx==0.24.2
  - mlx-lm==0.22.4
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.21

- Added support for Mistral Small 3.1 

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==765f4a6
  - mlx==0.24.0
  - mlx-lm==0.22.2
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.21

- Added support for Gemma 3 text-only models
  - Download these models from the Discover tab: `mlx-community/gemma-3-text-it`
  - These models should give better results for text-only tasks compared to image-enabled gemma-3
- Upgraded jinja2 package

MLX version info:
  - mlx-engine==9d49be6
  - mlx==0.23.2
  - mlx-lm==0.22.0
  - mlx-vlm==0.1.17

- Google Gemma 3 vision model support (requires LM Studio 0.3.13+)
- Engine package size reduced by ~700MB
- Fixed a bug where Gemma 3 crashes when there is more than one image

  - Ref: https://github.com/lmstudio-ai/mlx-engine/pull/105
